column8: Mandy: Hi Matt. How are you? What______________(you/do) recently?
column9: Matt: Oh, hi Mandy! Well,_______________(I/study) for my exams.
column11: Matt: Very! Basically,______________(I/just/sit) at my desk in y bedroom for the past three weeks and_____________(I/not/go) out at all. ___________(I/work) with Machel, my best friend, some of the time, though, so at least I've had some company. How about you?
column12: Mandy: Well, my mum and_____________(I/paint) my bedroom for the last few days. That has been fun! And______________(we/also/plan) our summer holiday.
column13: Matt: Great! Where are you going? Mandy: Well, we haven't decided yet. _______________(We/look) at different places to see which we like best.
column14: Matt: I'm sure you'll have a great time, whenever you go. Oh, by the way. ______________(I/think) of having a party when I finish my exams. Would you like to come?Mandy: Sure! That would be great!
